text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is about to start. Meanwhile,
Gold Ship is contemplating the race in terms of
life itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Conquer a mountain, and you'll be led back to
the ocean! No one can stop Gold Ship once she
starts rowing. The same is true for races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship must now race against her longtime
rivals. The curtains rise on the ultimate race of the
Twinkle Series!
